title: zantedeschia odorata
intro: Zantedeschia odorata, also known as the fragrant calla lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Zantedeschia odorata include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant include using the leaves and flowers to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
